# v0.1.11

## 更新说明

- 巡检过程中账号列表会随进度更新，无需手动刷新
- 修复「当前状态 / 检测结果」标签被挤换行的问题
- 优化顶部使用说明文案，与按钮含义对齐，更易理解
- 本机管理接口连不上时，会按当前页面地址自动重试禁用 / 启用 / 删除（更适配 Docker、反代）
- 建议在 Docker / 自定义端口环境显式配置 `CPA_MANAGEMENT_BASE_URL`

## English

- Account list updates live during inspection (no manual refresh)
- Fixed status / result pills wrapping mid-label
- Clearer page description, aligned with the action buttons
- If local management is unreachable, disable / enable / delete retries using the current page origin (better for Docker and reverse proxies)
- For Docker or custom ports, prefer setting `CPA_MANAGEMENT_BASE_URL` explicitly
